mapper.insert: INSERT INTO foods (id, name_vi, name_en, name_ja, name_ko, description, category, image_url, introduction_images, subtitle_vi, subtitle_en, subtitle_ja, subtitle_ko, hero_tagline_vi, hero_tagline_en, hero_tagline_ja, hero_tagline_ko, price_min, price_max, price_currency, core_ingredients, varieties, history_origin, ingredients_preparation, fun_fact, how_to_eat_description, how_to_eat_steps, theme_color, tags, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{nameVi}, #{nameEn}, #{nameJa}, #{nameKo}, #{description}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, #{introductionImages}, #{subtitleVi}, #{subtitleEn}, #{subtitleJa}, #{subtitleKo}, #{heroTaglineVi}, #{heroTaglineEn}, #{heroTaglineJa}, #{heroTaglineKo}, #{priceMin}, #{priceMax}, #{priceCurrency}, #{coreIngredients}, #{varieties}, #{historyOrigin}, #{ingredientsPreparation}, #{funFact}, #{howToEatDescription}, #{howToEatSteps}, #{themeColor}, #{tags}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE foods SET name_vi = #{nameVi}, name_en = #{nameEn}, name_ja = #{nameJa}, name_ko = #{nameKo}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, introduction_images = #{introductionImages}, subtitle_vi = #{subtitleVi}, subtitle_en = #{subtitleEn}, subtitle_ja = #{subtitleJa}, subtitle_ko = #{subtitleKo}, hero_tagline_vi = #{heroTaglineVi}, hero_tagline_en = #{heroTaglineEn}, hero_tagline_ja = #{heroTaglineJa}, hero_tagline_ko = #{heroTaglineKo}, price_min = #{priceMin}, price_max = #{priceMax}, price_currency = #{priceCurrency}, core_ingredients = #{coreIngredients}, varieties = #{varieties}, history_origin = #{historyOrigin}, ingredients_preparation = #{ingredientsPreparation}, fun_fact = #{funFact}, how_to_eat_description = #{howToEatDescription}, how_to_eat_steps = #{howToEatSteps}, theme_color = #{themeColor}, tags = #{tags}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM foods
AND (LOWER(name_vi) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{q}), '%') OR LOWER(name_en) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{q}), '%'))

SELECT city_slug FROM ( SELECT city_slug FROM food_city_scores WHERE city_slug IS NOT NULL AND city_slug != '' UNION SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(destinations) AS city_slug FROM places WHERE destinations IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_typeof(destinations) = 'array' ) known_city_slugs WHERE city_slug IS NOT NULL AND city_slug != '' ORDER BY city_slug
mapper.sql: f.id, f.name_vi, f.name_en, f.name_ja, f.name_ko, f.description, f.category, f.subtitle_vi, f.subtitle_en, f.subtitle_ja, f.subtitle_ko, f.hero_tagline_vi, f.hero_tagline_en, f.hero_tagline_ja, f.hero_tagline_ko, f.price_min, f.price_max, f.price_currency, f.core_ingredients, f.varieties, f.history_origin, f.ingredients_preparation, f.fun_fact, f.how_to_eat_description, f.how_to_eat_steps, f.theme_color, f.tags, COALESCE(fcs.image_url, f.image_url) AS image_url, COALESCE(fcs.introduction_images, f.introduction_images) AS introduction_images, fcs.score, fcs.city_slug, fcs.local_description, fcs.flavor_profile::text AS flavor_profile
mapper.select: SELECT FROM foods f INNER JOIN food_city_scores fcs ON fcs.food_id = f.id WHERE f.id = #{foodId} AND fcs.city_slug = #{citySlug}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food_city_scores (id, food_id, city_slug, score, local_description, short_description, region_key, image_url, introduction_images, flavor_profile, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{foodId}, #{citySlug}, #{score}, #{localDescription}, #{shortDescription}, #{regionKey}, #{imageUrl}, #{introductionImages}, #{flavorProfile}::jsonb, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE food_city_scores SET city_slug = #{citySlug}, score = #{score}, local_description = #{localDescription}, short_description = #{shortDescription}, region_key = #{regionKey}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, introduction_images = #{introductionImages}, flavor_profile = #{flavorProfile}::jsonb, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM food_city_scores WHERE food_id = #{foodId} ORDER BY score DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_foods (place_id, food_id) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{foodId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_foods WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND food_id = #{foodId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM places p INNER JOIN place_foods pf ON pf.place_id = p.id WHERE pf.food_id = #{foodId}
AND p.destinations @> #{citySlugJson}::jsonb
mapper.sql:
FROM places p INNER JOIN place_foods pf ON pf.place_id = p.id WHERE pf.food_id = #{foodId}
AND p.destinations @> #{citySlugJson}::jsonb
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.thumbnail, p.adjusted_rating, p.price_range, p.address, p.latitude, p.longitude, NULL::float8 AS distance_meters
ORDER BY p.title LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pf.place_id, f.id AS food_id, f.name_vi, f.name_en, f.name_ja, f.name_ko FROM place_foods pf INNER JOIN foods f ON f.id = pf.food_id WHERE pf.place_id IN
#{id}

SELECT f.id, f.name_vi, f.name_en, f.name_ja, f.name_ko, f.description, f.category, COALESCE(fcs.image_url, f.image_url) AS image_url, COALESCE(fcs.introduction_images, f.introduction_images) AS introduction_images, fcs.score, fcs.city_slug, fcs.local_description, fcs.flavor_profile::text AS flavor_profile, f.fun_fact FROM place_foods pf INNER JOIN foods f ON f.id = pf.food_id LEFT JOIN food_city_scores fcs ON fcs.food_id = f.id AND fcs.city_slug = #{citySlug} WHERE pf.place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY fcs.score DESC NULLS LAST, f.name_en ASC
